title: Colouring in, singing on their first day at school
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Grade 1s are sharing...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Grade 1s are sharing their class with the Grade 2s at Mossel Bay EC Primary School in New Sunnyside.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Grade 1s are sharing their class with the Grade 2s at Mossel Bay EC Primary School in New Sunnyside."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school was called All Saints Primary previously.","html":"The school was called All Saints Primary previously."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Because the school is small, some of the classes are shared.","html":"Because the school is small, some of the classes are shared."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The little ones were colouring in quietly and then singing and were extremely well behaved when Mossel Bay Advertiser popped by the school on 15 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 1 teacher Natasha van Rensburg said the Grade 1s benefitted greatly from sharing a class with children a year older than they, because they learnt from the Grade 2s.","html":"Grade 1 teacher Natasha van Rensburg said the Grade 1s benefitted greatly from sharing a class with children a year older than they, because they learnt from the Grade 2s."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery here: Colouring in on their first day at school"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Rensburg is delighted to be celebrating her 20th year of teaching in 2025 and says: \"It's still my passion. I am living my dream.\"","html":"Van Rensburg is delighted to be celebrating her 20th year of teaching in 2025 and says: \"It's still my passion. I am living my dream.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See videos below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Colouring in, singing on their first day at school
